excerpt: The official programme page for MA in English Studies for the Professions lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/71026-mcf-mcp-mlf-mlp Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: Applicants should indicate their chosen specialism when applying.
